join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom='USD', value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Materialize a sentinel-filled direct array keyed by adsh code from the sub_sic_postings range scan; fetch sic and cik from the surviving sub rowid.
Build a compact hash map from EQ pre rows keyed by triple with multiplicity count so SUM(value) and AVG(value) preserve join multiplicity without materializing duplicate joined rows.
Probe the persisted tag_tag_version_hash only after pre pruning; validate abstract=0 and fetch tlabel code for grouping.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(max_adsh_code+1, value=sub_rowid_or_sentinel) populated from sub_sic_postings range; sub_sic and sub_cik stay in column arrays
data_structures.fact_join: compact_hash_map(read_only, key=(adsh_u32,tag_u32,version_u32), value=eq_count_u16_or_u32) built from pre_stmt_postings; pre_built_index(tag_tag_version_hash) for late tag lookup

indexes.purpose: enumerate sub rows in the SIC range and seed the filtered adsh direct array
enumerate only USD num rowids for the fact-side scan
enumerate only EQ pre rows to build the filtered triple-count hash table
late exact lookup on (tag, version) to fetch tlabel and verify abstract=0

distinct_aggregation.strategy: deduplicate thread-local (sic,tlabel,stmt,cik) keys during probing, then merge unique company keys into per-group num_companies counts
